title: Media Viewer
description: A component that provides a rich media viewing experience with support for images, videos, and documents. It includes features like zooming, panning, rotation, and fullscreen mode, along with a gallery view for browsing multiple media items.

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using the ax-media-viewer component to display media content

sections.title: Image Viewing
sections.description: View and interact with images using zoom, pan, and rotation controls

sections.title: Video Playback
sections.description: Play and control video content with custom controls

sections.title: Gallery View
sections.description: Browse through multiple media items in a gallery layout

types.title: AXMediaViewerComponent
types.description: The main component for displaying media content

props.name: items
props.description: Array of media items to display

props.name: currentIndex
props.description: Index of the currently displayed media item

props.name: showControls
props.description: Whether to show the media controls

props.name: fullscreen
props.description: Whether the viewer is in fullscreen mode

events.name: itemChange
events.description: Emitted when the current media item changes

events.name: fullscreenChange
events.description: Emitted when the fullscreen state changes

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

/**
 * Navigates to the next media item.
 */
next(): void

/**
 * Navigates to the previous media item.
 */
previous(): void

/**
 * Zooms the current media item.
 * @param level - The zoom level (1 = 100%)
 */
zoom(level: number): void

/**
 * Rotates the current media item.
 * @param degrees - The rotation angle in degrees
 */
rotate(degrees: number): void
